candidate_definition_hints.text: Radar odometry code which removes motion distortion and Doppler effects from Navtech radar data.

This repo contains radar odometry code which removes motion distortion and Doppler effects from Navtech radar data. For our odometry experiments, we use the [Oxford Radar Robotcar Dataset](https://oxford-robotics-institute.github.io/radar-robotcar-dataset/). For our metric local…
